Name: @smoke Products page shows 6 products
Description: The inventory page must display exactly 6 products.

Name: @smoke Cart is empty on fresh login
Description: A freshly logged-in user should have an empty cart.

Name: @smoke Items added from products page appear in cart
Description: A product added on the inventory page should appear in the cart.

Name: @smoke Completing order shows success message
Description: Finishing an order should display a thank-you confirmation message.

Name: @smoke @e2e Complete purchase of single item
Description: Full happy-path journey: login → add item → checkout → confirm order.

Name: @smoke Add one product to cart updates badge
Description: Adding a product should increment the cart badge counter to 1.

Name: @smoke Complete checkout step one with valid info
Description: Filling in valid customer info should advance to the order overview page.

Name: @smoke Login page displays logo
Description: Verifies the Swag Labs logo is visible on the login page.

Name: @smoke Login with valid standard user credentials
Description: Verifies that a valid user can log in and land on the inventory page.

Name: @smoke @e2e Complete purchase of multiple items
Description: Purchase flow with 3 items — verifies badge count, cart count, and subtotal calculation.

Name: @smoke Checkout button navigates to checkout step one
Description: Clicking Checkout should proceed to the first checkout step.

Name: @smoke Login with valid standard user credentials
Description: Verifies that a valid user can log in and land on the inventory page.

Name: @smoke Step two shows correct item in summary
Description: The order overview should show the cart badge still reads 1 item.
